Text.Page:
Mission Orders

Go to Ascent of Saravash

Kill the {@linkcreature:479#47951#Abukaizel}, {@linkcreature:479#47952#Belsamael}, {@linkcreature:479#47953#Virrsek}, {@linkcreature:479#47955#Namburus}, {@linkcreature:479#47956#Rubinaria}, {@linkcreature:479#47954#Saravash}

Report to Arkaius, Kaia's Sword Commander.

Thank you for your help.

Your story will be passed down through the generations. You've done well.

Kill remaining argons.

Go to Ascent of Saravash and express Kaia's anger!
